problem_description: impl-spec-test对IMPL-SRC-RAW-TO-SRC-ADR048-001执行deep_spec_testing后，返回verdict=block，implementation_readiness=not_ready。两个blocker：(1) task-order-undefined: IMPL包缺少有序实现链序列定义，implementation_executability得分2/10；(2) touch-set-missing: IMPL包缺少明确的touch-set所有权映射。recommended_action=rederive_upstream, recommended_actor=upstream_owner, repair_target_artifact=IMPL。这是治理型ADR-048的IMPL包，不是实际代码实现，其blocking来自实现就绪度而非治理完整性。
